scripts.build: cross-env BUILD_TARGET=background vite build --config vite.config.ts && cross-env BUILD_TARGET=content vite build --config vite.config.ts && cp manifest.json dist/
scripts.dev: cross-env BUILD_TARGET=background vite build --watch --config vite.config.ts & cross-env BUILD_TARGET=content vite build --watch --config vite.config.ts
